occupation: MD| CEO| Board Member at Sui Northern Gas Pipelines limited
headline: CEO| Board member| Energy| Oil & Gas| Industry| Technology| Diversity| Multinationals| Middle East| MBA| Engineering
summary:
30 years of hands on experience in operationally leading, managing international conglomerates with focus on following sectors
Energy Oil and Gas
Power and Renewable,
Water , Chemicals & Gases
Healthcare

I’ve devoted my entire career to designing groundbreaking technical/industrial solutions that create profitable divisions and revitalize under performing units. With extensive experience in the development, motivation, and leadership of personnel, I consistently produce unprecedented results.

NEGOTIATING AND MANAGING MEGA ACCOUNTS WITH $1+ BILLION CONTRACTS
Exceptionally well-versed in all aspects of strategic business development, I have an impressive track record of generating billion-dollar international sales growth and expanding revenue streams with key accounts like Saudi Aramco.

► Successfully managed a $1 billion order, including 10% in local content/services, with SABIC company Hadeed

DIRECTING SUCCESSFUL STARTUPS & TURNAROUNDS
I’ve been appointed to turn around a stock-listed entity that generated $156 million/year and had 2700 employees. In doing so, I proved my commitment to improving bottom-line profitability while achieving the highest levels of customer satisfaction.

► While turning annual losses into 10% operating profit in 2013, I raised the margin again to 18% in 2015 for a medical company.

EXPERTLY MANAGING COMPLEX GLOBAL PROJECTS
Respected for effectively communicating project goals throughout all levels of an enterprise, I provide deliverable on time and under budget.

► Achieving 50+% of market share within a year of establishing the largest sleep and respiratory care center in Abu Dhabi, I developed a center with 30 clinical personnel and the capacity to handle 2000 patients each year.

SPECIALTIES:

• Leadership: Building, leading, and coaching global teams of 300+.
• Execution: Relentless and tenacious in exceeding goals and expectations.
• Innovation: Known for pushing boundaries with out-of-box thinking.

experiences.title: MD| CEO| Board Member
experiences.description: A multi billion dollar, State owned Entity, Leading and managing the Gas Transmission and Distribution. More than 140 KM of Network and a mega utility of more than 7.4 Million users . Responsible for Energy security of the country.

experiences.title: Chief Operating Officer(Interim)
experiences.description: Mainly focused on implementing Key internal controls and processes. Optimizing the company performance through operational excellence measures .

experiences.company: Critical Power and Equipment and Trading LLC.
experiences.title: Director of Operations and Business Development
experiences.description: As a shareholder in a technology company focusing on power electronic solutions with representation from leading manufacturers in Europe and the United States. I ensure the full satisfaction of major oil, gas, and energy customers, including EPCs, oil majors, and industrial/defense contractors. In addition, I provide expert consultation to German conglomerates on optimizing business potential in the Middle East.

experiences.title: Head of Region GCC/Managing Director/ Board Member- Linde Healthcare Middle East LLC.
experiences.description: Recruited by Healthcare CEO and a Board member to lead the 5-year growth strategy, I improved the quality of homecare, sleep, and hospital care in the Middle East by successfully launching the Linde Healthcare brand. I formed a new entity and architected the organizational structure to aggressively grow region across Saudi Arabia and UAE. Tasked with increasing annual revenue target from ~$50,000 in 2013 to $250 million in 2018, I am on track to meet/exceed all goals and achieve 20% operating profit. DELIVERED RESULTS: ► Achieving 50+% of market share within a year of establishing the largest sleep and respiratory care center in Abu Dhabi, I established a center that had 30 clinical personnel and the capacity to handle 2000 patients each year. ► I conceptualized and created the $500 million/annum Home Care program for a leading government medical city hospital to manage 20,000+ patients in Saudi Arabia. In doing so, I obtained buy-in from key stakeholders. ► Turning annual losses into 10% operating profit in 2013, I raised the margin again to 18% in 2015 for a medical gases business.

experiences.title: CEO/Managing Director/Board Member - Siemens Engineering Company, Pakistan.
experiences.description: Siemens Pakistan - Appointed by the executive board to turn around Siemens Pakistan, a stock-listed entity that generated $156 million/year and had 2700 employees, I reviewed the status and key performance indicators (KPIs) regularly with Siemens AG Board of Directors. I inherited and restored this declining business with massive employee redundancy and ~1% operational profitability. DELIVERED RESULTS: ► While maintaining market share against local/international competition, I grew revenue and produced high-impact sales concepts. I strengthened and leveraged local energy/power markets to further expand business. ► I saved considerable operational expenses by divesting non-profitable business units and reducing headcount. While doing so, I negotiated effectively with labor unions. ► Streamlining complex infrastructures, I successfully reorganized all business segments, including the Energy, Industry, and Healthcare divisions. I reduced reliance on exports and diversified/decentralized the core business.

experiences.company: Siemens AG, Energy Oil & Gas , UAE
experiences.title: Director of Strategy & Engineering, Energy Oil and Gas Headquarters
experiences.description: Reporting directly to the CEO of Energy Oil and Gas division, which had 12,000 employees and $6 billion in annual turnover, I built the new Oil and Gas headquarters in Abu Dhabi from the ground up. I consolidated the technology portfolio, encompassing instrumentation and control, consulting services, asset integrity, operational excellence software, and water technologies. I led Siemen’s first attempt to move headquarters out of Germany, structuring the Oil and Gas HQ to successfully serve Middle East, Far East, and European businesses. DELIVERED RESULTS: ► Managing a multi million-dollar project, I maintained operating profits at 25+%. I rolled out operational intelligence software based on Siemens XHQ software platform, deploying the solution across the enterprise on most of Saudi Aramco assets, including gas plants, refineries, gas-oil separation packages GOSPs, terminals, pipelines, and intelligent fields with EXPEC. * Integrated the water technology operation with 417 employees,  The business was based out of the United States with sales offices in Singapore, China, Europe, and the Middle East. * I added Enhanced Oil Recovery (EOR) solutions to the product portfolio, and developed new standards in IT operational intelligence, automation/water technologies, instrumentation and control (I&C), and maintaining balanced scorecards.

experiences.title: VP/GM, Energy Oil and Gas / Industrial Solutions Division
experiences.description: While overseeing sales, operations, business development, finance, administration, and human resources, I directed 2 divisions with 400 employees.  I built a robust portfolio that included instrumentation and control systems, digital and industrial Internet solutions, asset integrity software, communication systems, power cables, turbines, compressors, and power equipment/services for substations ranging from 32 KV to 220 KV. Expertly managing control systems, oil and gas solutions, rotating equipment, and key accounts, I ensured full customer satisfaction while catering to industrial clients in oil, gas, water, petrochemicals, metals, mining, and infrastructure systems. I established a local technology center in Saudi Arabia to share best practices, optimize global competitiveness, and open new project opportunities. NOTABLE PROJECTS: * Closed first major order for INDX software, a USD  ~$50 million acquisition. * Improved control system for daily flow of 2 million barrels of oil, covering 13 pump stations and 1300 kilometers. * Won major I&C project, beating stiff competition. * Garnered major win against GE with SGT60 turbines. * Implemented fail safe technologies for 1200 wellhead shutdown systems for Saudi Aramco * Directed $1 billion order, with ~ $100 million in local content/services, after winning large steel project with Hadeed.

experiences.title: Manager/Project Manager , Oil and Gas operations
experiences.description: : I optimized all Saudi Aramco operations and its P&L while driving sales, and I engineered industrial projects.

experiences.title: Project Engineer
experiences.description: After completing comprehensive training in Karlsruhe, Germany, I engineered control systems for a power plant.

certifications.name: General Management Course (GMC)- Executive management Program with Siemens AG
certifications.authority: Siemens AG - Top Executive management Program

recommendations:
Gerald Rogers

I worked with Ali while growing Siemens Water oil & gas business in the middle east.  If found him to be a very strong strategic thinker, a leader of his employees ;and having very strong relationships with his customers.  If Ali would have wanted to relocate to the US I would have made him a part of our Sr. management team.

Jack Montgomery

Having interviewed literally thousands of Senior Executives over the last 10 years as a Headhunter, Im always impressed the brainpower of individuals who can successfully translate their managerial skills from one industry into another.  Ali is a good example of a C-Suite leader who can do that.  I met Ali shortly after he had made the jump from Siemens to Linde, and over the course of the next 3 years of us discussing and working together on several projects, he demonstrated an ability to quickly grasp what were the critical areas on which he needed to focus to successfully drive his business.  If I was working on any relevant search mandate, he would be the first candidate I would put forward.

Jack Montgomery

Having interviewed literally thousands of Senior Executives over the last 10 years as a Headhunter, I’m always impressed the brainpower of individuals who can successfully translate their managerial skills from one industry into another.
